news.t: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
Diversifying Portfolios: MFS Launches 2 New ETFs
MFS Launches MFS Active International Value ETF (NYSE Arca: MIVL) and MFS Blended Research Small-Mid Cap ETF (NYSE Arca: BRSM)

holdings.infoBox: BRSM is an equity ETF with a total of 308 individual holdings. The top holdings are Okta, Inc. stock at 1.14%, Aramark at 1.05%, Curtiss-Wright at 1.01%, Roku, Inc. at 1.00%, and MYR Group at 0.99%.

overview.description: The MFS Blended Research Small-Mid Cap ETF (BRSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through exposure to small- and mid-cap companies. The portfolio may also hold foreign securities. BRSM was launched on Jun 4, 2026 and is issued by MFS.

data.title: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
data.text: The U.S. ETF landscape reached a massive $15.7 trillion in total assets under management by the end of May, as the industry continues to grow rapidly. Year-to-date ETF inflows grew to a staggering $84...

data.title: Diversifying Portfolios: MFS Launches 2 New ETFs
data.text: On June 4, MFS expanded its ETF suite with the launch of the MFS Blended Research Small-Mid Cap ETF (BRSM) and the MFS Active International Value ETF (MIVL). With an expense ratio of 38 basis points, ...

data.title: MFS Launches MFS Active International Value ETF (NYSE Arca: MIVL) and MFS Blended Research Small-Mid Cap ETF (NYSE Arca: BRSM)
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MFS launched the firm's 10th and 11th actively managed ETFs, MFS Active International Value ETF and MFS Blended Research Small-Mid Cap ETF.
